body_txt: An easy way to make a character loathsome is to have them ostracize or tease someone with a (usually physical) disability. Most bullies wouldn't mock someone for having a disability — it's seen as too mean to mock someone who is " helpless " or someone who has an issue they have no control over — so only the cruelest characters do. Usually only younger characters act this way, however adults and even parents are also known to. Expect the ones who use this trope to later receive some form of punishment for their behavior . This is also a lesser-known part of fascist rhetoric in real life. In addition to the better-known racism, antisemitism, homophobia, and more , they also consider disabled people to be parasitic drains on society and/or inferior by definition to non-disabled people. They may also claim that disabled people are using their disabilities to justify misbehaviour , are faking their disabilities or at least exaggerating their severity etc. and need to be "taught a lesson." Super-Trope to Infertility Intolerance . Compare to Bury Your Disabled , Abandon the Disabled , Neurodivergence Stigma , and Politically Incorrect Villain . Sub-Trope to Kick the Dog and Moral Event Horizon . May be a reason for the disabled character Hiding the Handicap . Also compare to its approximate counterpart Disability as an Excuse for Jerkassery . Contrast Handicapped Badass , where bullies should not mess with this disabled character or they will be disabled themselves, and Wouldn't Harm the Disabled for characters who refuse to harm disabled people. See also Disability Aid Loss and Mistaken for Faked Disability . May overlap with Disability Gag if it is Played for Laughs or with Would Harm a Senior if the bullied character is elderly. Related to Braces-Based Bullying and Bullying the Bespectacled .
